requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Cambodia Building and Fire Authority Requirements (Ministry of Interior / Fire Marshal)
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——柬埔寨建筑和消防主管机关要求（内政部/消防督察）
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——柬埔寨建築和消防主管機關要求（內政部/消防督察）

summary.en: Cambodia does not have a specific standalone national fire code for stationary battery energy storage systems (BESS) as of the dataset date. Fire safety for commercial and industrial buildings — including BESS installations — falls under the jurisdiction of the Ministry of Interior's General Department of National Police (fire marshal function) and relevant municipal or provincial building authorities. In the absence of a BESS-specific fire code, project developers and installers in Cambodia typically reference IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for grid-integrated electrochemical-based energy storage systems) and apply local building fire regulations and fire authority approval requirements. International project financiers and EPC contractors operating in Cambodia commonly apply international best-practice standards, including NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) or IEC 62933-5-2, as the technical design basis for BESS fire safety. Formal adoption of NFPA 855 or any equivalent BESS-specific fire installation standard by a Cambodian authority has not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date — direct verification with the relevant local fire authority and building authority is required before project design is finalised.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，柬埔寨尚无专门针对固定式储能电池系统（BESS）的独立国家消防规范。商业及工业建筑（包括BESS装置）的消防安全由内政部国家警察总局（消防督察职能）及相关市级或省级建筑主管机关负责管辖。在缺乏BESS专项消防规范的情况下，柬埔寨的项目开发商和安装方通常参照IEC 62933-5-2（并网电化学储能系统安全要求）并遵守当地建筑消防法规及消防主管机关审批要求。在柬埔寨运营的国际项目融资方和EPC承包商通常将国际最佳实践标准——包括NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）或IEC 62933-5-2——作为BESS消防安全的技术设计依据。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认柬埔寨任何主管机关正式采纳NFPA 855或任何等效BESS专项消防安装标准——在项目设计最终确定前，须直接向相关当地消防主管机关和建筑主管机关核实。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，柬埔寨尚無專門針對固定式儲能電池系統（BESS）的獨立國家消防規範。商業及工業建築（包括BESS裝置）的消防安全由內政部國家警察總局（消防督察職能）及相關市級或省級建築主管機關負責管轄。在缺乏BESS專項消防規範的情況下，柬埔寨的項目開發商和安裝方通常參照IEC 62933-5-2（併網電化學儲能系統安全要求）並遵守當地建築消防法規及消防主管機關審批要求。在柬埔寨運營的國際項目融資方和EPC承包商通常將國際最佳實踐標準——包括NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）或IEC 62933-5-2——作為BESS消防安全的技術設計依據。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認柬埔寨任何主管機關正式採納NFPA 855或任何等效BESS專項消防安裝標準——在項目設計最終確定前，須直接向相關當地消防主管機關和建築主管機關核實。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems for grid integration (IEC-based reference framework; ISC adoption status to be confirmed directly with ISC at isc.gov.kh)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (international best-practice reference widely applied by project financiers and EPCs in Cambodia; formal adoption by Cambodian authority unconfirmed as of dataset date)
Ministry of Interior, Cambodia (General Department of National Police — fire marshal function) — building and fire safety authority for commercial and industrial facilities

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Cambodian fire or building authorities as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 or NFPA 855-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2 or NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for Cambodian authority and project-owner review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被柬埔寨消防或建筑主管机关认可为等同于基于IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在柬埔寨主管机关和项目业主审查中补充符合IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被柬埔寨消防或建築主管機關認可為等同於基於IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在柬埔寨主管機關和項目業主審查中補充符合IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed BESS-specific fire installation code exists in Cambodia as of the dataset date. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy the IEC 62933-5-2 and local building fire regulation requirements that project owners, international financiers, and Cambodian building authorities will apply. Exporters and project teams should: (a) verify directly with the relevant Cambodian municipal or provincial building authority and fire marshal the applicable building and fire codes for the specific project location and installation type before design is finalised; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) where international project financiers apply NFPA 855 as the design basis, prepare supplementary NFPA 855-aligned documentation; (d) engage a fire protection engineer experienced in IEC 62933-5-2 or NFPA 855 BESS installations for design review before application submission.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，柬埔寨尚无经确认的BESS专项消防安装规范。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足项目业主、国际融资方及柬埔寨建筑主管机关所适用的IEC 62933-5-2和当地建筑消防法规要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在设计最终确定前，直接向相关柬埔寨市级或省级建筑主管机关及消防督察核实特定项目地点和安装类型适用的建筑和消防规范；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）若国际项目融资方以NFPA 855作为设计依据，应准备符合NFPA 855的补充文件；（d）在提交申请前，聘请具有IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855 BESS安装经验的消防工程师进行设计审查。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，柬埔寨尚無經確認的BESS專項消防安裝規範。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足項目業主、國際融資方及柬埔寨建築主管機關所適用的IEC 62933-5-2和當地建築消防法規要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在設計最終確定前，直接向相關柬埔寨市級或省級建築主管機關及消防督察核實特定項目地點和安裝類型適用的建築和消防規範；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）若國際項目融資方以NFPA 855作為設計依據，應準備符合NFPA 855的補充文件；（d）在提交申請前，聘請具有IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855 BESS安裝經驗的消防工程師進行設計審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — building and fire authority approval required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Cambodia; no confirmed BESS-specific fire code as of dataset date — verify directly with local fire and building authority for each project location
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Ministry of Interior, Cambodia (General Department of National Police — fire marshal function)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed BESS-specific fire installation code exists in Cambodia as of the dataset date. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy the IEC 62933-5-2 and local building fire regulation requirements applied by project owners, international financiers, and Cambodian building and fire authorities. Engage the relevant Cambodian building and fire authority and a fire protection engineer experienced in IEC 62933-5-2 at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable fire code requirements and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，柬埔寨尚无经确认的BESS专项消防安装规范。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足项目业主、国际融资方及柬埔寨建筑和消防主管机关所适用的IEC 62933-5-2和当地建筑消防法规要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与相关柬埔寨建筑和消防主管机关及具有IEC 62933-5-2经验的消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范要求和设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，柬埔寨尚無經確認的BESS專項消防安裝規範。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足項目業主、國際融資方及柬埔寨建築和消防主管機關所適用的IEC 62933-5-2和當地建築消防法規要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與相關柬埔寨建築和消防主管機關及具有IEC 62933-5-2經驗的消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範要求和設計要求。
